model: not used — semantic policy layer isolated

cases.step: คำนวณเปอร์เซ็นต์พนักงานที่มี skills
cases.wrong_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT employee_id) AS skilled_employees FROM skills
cases.correct_sql: SELECT 100.0 * COUNT(DISTINCT s.employee_id) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT e.employee_id), 0) AS pct_skill_coverage FROM employees e LEFT JOIN skills s ON e.employee_id = s.employee_id

cases.step: รวมชั่วโมงอบรมก่อน review ล่าสุด
cases.wrong_sql: SELECT SUM(hours) AS pre_review_hours FROM training_records
cases.correct_sql: WITH latest_review AS (SELECT employee_id, review_date, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY employee_id ORDER BY review_date DESC) rn FROM performance_reviews) SELECT SUM(t.hours) AS pre_review_hours FROM latest_review lr LEFT JOIN training_records t ON t.employee_id = lr.employee_id AND t.end_date <= lr.review_date WHERE lr.rn = 1

cases.step: join skills และ projects โดยป้องกันยอดซ้ำ
cases.wrong_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS joined_rows FROM employees e JOIN skills s ON e.employee_id = s.employee_id JOIN projects p ON e.employee_id = p.employee_id
cases.correct_sql: WITH skill_emp AS (SELECT employee_id, COUNT(*) skill_count FROM skills GROUP BY employee_id), project_emp AS (SELECT employee_id, SUM(project_value) project_value FROM projects GROUP BY employee_id) SELECT COUNT(*) AS joined_rows FROM employees e LEFT JOIN skill_emp s ON e.employee_id = s.employee_id LEFT JOIN project_emp p ON e.employee_id = p.employee_id

cases.step: ยืนยัน active headcount กับหลักฐานก่อนหน้า
cases.wrong_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) + 1 AS active_headcount FROM employees WHERE status = N'ปฏิบัติงาน'
cases.correct_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS active_headcount FROM employees WHERE status = N'ปฏิบัติงาน'

scope_limit: Rule-grounded semantics for four declared contracts; not open-ended semantic understanding.
